_disabled.desc: Give it a grayed out appearance?

_csstemplate: #{id} {{{if _parent.position<>'static'}position:{_parent.position};{/if}{if display<>''} display:{display};{/if}{if left<>'' and left<>'auto'} left:{left!p};{/if}{if right<>'' and right<>'auto'} right:{right!p};{/if}{if top<>'' and top<>'auto'} top:{top!p};{/if}{if bottom<>'' and bottom<>'auto'} bottom:{bottom!p};{/if}{if height<>'' and height<>'auto'} height:{height!p};{/if}{if width<>'' and width<>'auto'} width:{width!p};{/if}{if orientation<>''} width:20px;{/if}}}
_htmltemplate: "<input id='{id}' class='form-range {class}' style='{style}' data-role=none type=range min={min} max={max} step={step} value={value} {if disabled=='true'} disabled{/if}></input>",
